pr.title: Non-record: SwiGLU + EMA + AdamW TTT + EBLS Findings (val_bpb=1.1746 on H100 NVL)

output.summary: Combines SwiGLU gating, EMA warmdown, eval-time AdamW TTT on MLPs, and EBLS layer-sharing insights to refine the shared-layer, quantized model.
techniques: SwiGLU MLP with EMA warmdown replacing ReLU²/SWA
Eval-time AdamW TTT adapts MLP weights per sliding window
EBLS depth-recurrent sharing exposes MLP invariance and quantization-noise amplification
